review:
I was driving through the south west so OF COURSE I needed a good taco.  I didn't get to actually eat my food until it was my husbands turn to drive, about three hours after we stopped, but it was still delicious.  This was definitely the most affordable place I ate at between md and ca but the quality was still top notch.  I'd prefer more fish per taco but I was so happy to get such a good amount of jalapeños in my pico de gallo.  Everything was very flavorful. Service was great and the restaurant itself was really nice inside too.  It's got that "hole in the wall" feel where you know you're about to get some awesome food without looking like a hole in the wall.  


Update:  I didn't think I'd be back since I was just traveling the first time.  But I'm stoked as hell.  I just got another order of fish tacos.  Still awesome.
